title: Stackable Trims
description: Allows you to put multiple trims on your armor at once!
body:
You know how you can have multiple patterns on banners? Well now you can customize your armor just as much too!
The mod allows you to put multiple trims on your armor at the same time instead of 1 at a time. You can customize the limit using the gamerule `maxTrimStack` for 1.21.1 and `max_trim_stack` for 26.1+, which is 32 by default, but can go up to 100 (which is kind of overboard).

To remove trims, use flint in an anvil.

It even works with modded trims and materials!!!

![Fancy](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/679/491/2023-06-17_03.png)

So go out and make your armor look fabulous!

### Addons:

*   [Stackable Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/stackable-elytra-trims)

Please report any issues!!!
